summary: This is a brief news post where Joel Spolsky shares a feature about Fog Creek Software published on SoftwareCEO.com. The external article highlights Spolsky's contrarian approach to running a software company, noting that he challenges conventional wisdom in the industry. Joel quotes the flattering description and urges readers to check it out before it goes behind a paywall.
key_points: Fog Creek Software was featured on SoftwareCEO.com's home page
The feature highlights Spolsky's skepticism toward received wisdom about running software companies
The article characterizes his views as 'refreshing and thought-provoking' but notes they work in his niche
money_quotes: Spolsky takes a skeptical view of almost every bit of received wisdom he's ever heard about running a software company.
His views are refreshing and thought-provoking, and they certainly work in his niche.
key_insight: A brief self-promotional post sharing external media coverage that frames Spolsky as a contrarian voice in software company management.
